claim_title: Five SDC rate files are triplicated across three directories

results.description: Verify canonical rate files are in sibling SDC repo and in-repo duplicates are removed.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

files = [
    "adjustment_factors_by_county.csv",
    "base_population_by_county.csv",
    "fertility_rates_by_county.csv",
    "migration_rates_by_county.csv",
    "survival_rates_by_county.csv",
]

sibling_root = Path("../sdc_2024_replication")
sibling_data = sibling_root / "data"
sibling_updated = sibling_root / "data_updated"
in_repo_rates = Path("data/processed/immigration/rates")

canonical_count = 0
in_repo_duplicate_count = 0

for name in files:
    flags = [
        int((sibling_data / name).exists()),
        int((sibling_updated / name).exists()),
        int((in_repo_rates / name).exists()),
    ]
    print(f"{name}::" + "".join(str(x) for x in flags))
    if flags[0] and flags[1]:
        canonical_count += 1
    if flags[2]:
        in_repo_duplicate_count += 1

print(f"SIBLING_SDC_EXISTS={int(sibling_root.exists())}")
print(f"CANONICAL_FILE_COUNT={canonical_count}")
print(f"IN_REPO_DUPLICATE_COUNT={in_repo_duplicate_count}")

if sibling_root.exists() and canonical_count == 5 and in_repo_duplicate_count == 0:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
